name: Febrile Neutropenia (Pediatric) - Medication Query (Cefepime)
description: Tests ability to find pediatric FN patients via empiric IV antibiotic prescriptions. Cefepime is the standard ELSA-FN antibiotic — heavily cross-indicated with other gram-negative infections, hospital-acquired pneumonia, etc.
prompt: Find pediatric patients prescribed cefepime — a broad-spectrum antibiotic used empirically for febrile neutropenia.

prompts.broad: Find pediatric patients prescribed cefepime — a broad-spectrum cephalosporin used as empiric therapy for febrile neutropenia and other serious gram-negative infections.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Pediatric patients on cefepime (broad cross-indication with hospital-acquired infections).
